meta.tagline: Upscale Thai fine dining in the heart of Hanoi

hero.title: The Golden Lotus
hero.subtitle: Where the art of Thai cuisine meets the elegance of modern space. Experience refined flavors crafted from the purest ingredients.

feature1.title: A Taste of Identity
feature1.desc: Every dish is a symphony of the five layers of flavor that define Thai cuisine.

feature2.title: Organic Greens
feature2.desc: Vegetables handpicked from local organic farms, guaranteeing the purest, freshest quality.

feature3.title: Signature Lotus
feature3.desc: A collection of our most refined dishes, handed down through generations of royal chefs.

menu.title: Signature Menu
menu.subtitle: A refined blend of traditional ingredients and contemporary presentation.

items.name: Royal Duck Curry
items.desc: Herb-roasted duck simmered in rich coconut milk with fragrant pineapple and organic cherry tomatoes.

items.name: Salt-Grilled River Prawns
items.desc: Giant river prawns charcoal-grilled to perfection, served with our signature lime-chili seafood sauce.

items.name: Royal Lotus Stem Salad
items.desc: Crisp fresh lotus stems tossed with shrimp, pork, and a delicate sweet-and-sour fish sauce dressing.

reservation.title: Reservations
reservation.subtitle: Let us prepare an unforgettable culinary experience just for you.
reservation.notePlaceholder: Notes on allergies or seating preferences...

items.name: Minh Huy
items.quote: The space here truly feels serene. The duck curry has such a refined flavor — not overpowering, yet it lingers wonderfully.

items.name: Anh Ngoc
items.quote: Best Thai food in Hanoi! The service is professional and attentive down to the smallest details, like the linens and fresh lotus flowers.

items.name: Thanh Phuong
items.quote: A flawless culinary experience. The seafood is incredibly fresh and the seasoning is authentically Thai yet still suits the Vietnamese palate.

contact.title: Contact & Map
contact.address: 123 Pho Hue, Hai Ba Trung, Hanoi

footer.desc: Crafting an upscale Thai dining space with the utmost respect for authentic local ingredients.
footer.address: 123 Pho Hue, Hai Ba Trung, Hanoi
